query: Ebola Bundibugyo outbreak Ituri Province DRC May 2026 deaths update Africa CDC
answer: All web search and fetch tools are unavailable in this session. I must report my findings based on what I can determine, noting the limitations clearly.
key_facts: All web search and fetch tools were unavailable during this research session; no live data could be retrieved.
Bundibugyo ebolavirus (BDBV) was first identified in Uganda in 2007 with a ~25% case fatality rate (149 cases, 37 deaths).
DRC's Ituri Province was previously affected by the 2018-2020 Ebola outbreak (Zaire strain, 3,400+ cases).
Ituri Province faces ongoing armed conflict that complicates public health emergency responses.
No verified current data on a May 2026 Bundibugyo Ebola outbreak in Ituri Province could be obtained.
Africa CDC and WHO Disease Outbreak News are the primary authoritative sources that should be consulted when tools are restored.
